host_runtime_note: Local hexa CLI on this host is parser-only (lacks exec/json_parse stdlib). Production hexa runtime executes .hexa tools end-to-end; smoke verdict therefore distinguishes parse-clean from runtime-executed.

notes: Pure-library constraint enforced for I46 + I47: structured_log.hexa and trace_context.hexa contain only fn defs (no top-level call), so they can be `use`d by serve_alm_persona.hexa or any handler without side effects.
Bash-equivalent smoke (shell percentile + ratio) was used to confirm semantic correctness of the algorithms baked into the .hexa self-test paths, since the local hexa CLI on this host is parser-only.
Hard constraint compliance: no .roadmap modification, no edits to tools outside the deliverable list, no .py files added.
